creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: The current mkimg test suite prevents regression. However, it doesn't ensure that the output is right. It would be great if we had a number of tests that would look at the partitions placed into at least the raw images to make sure they conform to constraints contained in the relevant standards and/or other functional elements that we want (eg if we implement a mkimg --aligned XXX, to make sure that the partitions start aligned to XXX).
